patient_name.description: First and last name of the caller. If not provided, output 'Unknown'.

phone_number.description: Callback number formatted with country code (e.g. +17605551234). Caller ID is captured automatically; confirm only if they give a different callback number.

procedure_interest.description: The primary dental procedure the patient is interested in.

urgency_timeline.description: How soon the patient wants to have the procedure done.

financial_status.description: The patient's stated budget expectation and payment method.

border_crossing_anxiety.description: True if the patient expresses concern or asks questions about safety or border wait times in Mexicali/Tijuana, so a human can address those concerns honestly (e.g. explain the VIP shuttle service).

travel_origin.description: The city or state the patient is traveling from (e.g. 'San Diego', 'Arizona').

pain_points.description: A 1-2 sentence summary, in the patient's own words where possible, of what is motivating them (e.g. discomfort with their current smile, difficulty eating). Do NOT diagnose or interpret symptoms; record only what the patient stated.

emergency_flag.description: Set to true if the caller reports acute symptoms — pain, bleeding, swelling, or signs of infection. This caller needs a human medical handoff, NOT a sales follow-up. Required by clinic safety policy.

competitors_mentioned.description: Names of other clinics or quotes the patient mentioned (e.g. 'My US dentist quoted me $30k', 'Sani Dental').

language_spoken.description: The primary language used during the call.
